name: FileDropZone
description: Accept files via drag-and-drop or file browser selection.

disabled.description: Disables drop and file selection interactions.

status.description: Applies validation feedback styling and status icon behavior.

onDrop.description: Receives dropped files for custom validation and handling.

accept.description: Passed via `FileDropZoneTrigger`; hints acceptable file types in native picker.

multiple.description: Passed via `FileDropZoneTrigger`; allows selecting multiple files.

onChange.description: Passed via `FileDropZoneTrigger`; handles files selected in the native picker.

slots.children: Compose with `FileDropZoneIcon`, instructional text, `FileDropZoneTrigger`, and optional validation/help text.

accessibility.role: group region containing a button trigger and hidden native file input
keyboard: Tab — moves focus to the Browse files button and onward in tab order
Shift + Tab — moves focus to previous focusable element
Space / Enter — activates Browse files and opens the native file explorer
aria: Provide clear instructional text for accepted file types and size constraints
Ensure error/success messages explain outcome and required user action
Treat `accept` as picker guidance only; enforce file validation in event handlers

inside: Form workflows that require file attachment
Dialog-based upload experiences with custom file lists/progress
